files.content:
import type { TableBuilderConfig, TableRow } from "../../components/tables/types";

export interface Row extends TableRow {
  "name": string;
  "email": string;
  "website": string;
  "balance": number;
  "status": string;
}


export const tableConfig: TableBuilderConfig = {
  "title": "Sandbox JS Demo",
  "description": "Each column runs its own sandboxed JS snippet on click. Inspect a column to see / edit its `clickAction.code`. The row itself opens a detail dialog — cell handlers do NOT trigger it.",
  "direction": "ltr",
  "density": "comfortable",
  "pageSize": 8,
  "sortMode": "client",
  "paginationMode": "client",
  "expandableLayout": "details",
  "expandableIconStyle": "chevron",
  "expandableIconPosition": "first",
  "paginationLayout": "full",
  "pageSizeOptions": [
    5,
    10,
    20,
    50,
    100
  ],
  "virtualRowHeight": 44,
  "virtualMaxHeight": 520,
  "enableSearch": true,
  "enablePagination": true,
  "enableRowSelection": false,
  "enableDnD": false,
  "enableColumnVisibility": false,
  "enableExport": false,
  "enableStriped": false,
  "enableHover": true,
  "enableBordered": false,
  "enableStickyHeader": false,
  "enableExpandableRows": false,
  "enableInlineEdit": false,
  "enableBulkActions": false,
  "enableColumnResize": false,
  "enableMultiSort": false,
  "enableColumnFilters": false,
  "enableRowGrouping": false,
  "enableAggregation": false,
  "enableFooter": false,
  "columns": [
    {
      "id": "c1",
      "key": "name",
      "label": "Name (toast)",
      "type": "text",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": true,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left",
      "clickAction": {
        "type": "js",
        "code": "helpers.toast(`Hello, ${row.name}! Email: ${row.email}`);"
      }
    },
    {
      "id": "c2",
      "key": "email",
      "label": "Email (copy)",
      "type": "email",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": true,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left",
      "clickAction": {
        "type": "js",
        "code": "await helpers.copy(value);\nhelpers.toast(`Copied ${value} to clipboard`);"
      }
    },
    {
      "id": "c3",
      "key": "website",
      "label": "Website (open new tab)",
      "type": "link",
      "sortable": false,
      "filterable": false,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left",
      "clickAction": {
        "type": "js",
        "code": "helpers.open(value, \"_blank\");"
      }
    },
    {
      "id": "c4",
      "key": "balance",
      "label": "Balance (conditional)",
      "type": "currency",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": false,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "right",
      "format": "$",
      "clickAction": {
        "type": "js",
        "code": "if (value > 1000) {\n  helpers.toast(`${row.name} is a high-value account`);\n} else {\n  helpers.toast(`${row.name}: standard account`, \"destructive\");\n}"
      }
    },
    {
      "id": "c5",
      "key": "status",
      "label": "Status (badge)",
      "type": "badge",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": true,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left",
      "badgeVariants": {
        "Active": "default",
        "Trial": "secondary",
        "Churned": "outline"
      },
      "clickAction": {
        "type": "js",
        "code": "helpers.toast(`Status for ${row.name}: ${value}`);"
      }
    },
    {
      "id": "c6",
      "key": "actions",
      "label": "",
      "type": "actions",
      "sortable": false,
      "filterable": false,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "right"
    }
  ]
} as const satisfies TableBuilderConfig;
